ocr_findings.description: QR code image rendered as '![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)' placeholder — expected, QR codes are not OCR-able as text.

reviewer_notes: Support/information page covering target exam scope, past-paper download URL, and reader inquiry address. All text including URLs (https://isbn2.sbcr.jp/24255/, https://it-pass.jp/), postal address, and section headers captured accurately. QR code replaced by image placeholder, which is appropriate.
